page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DSv3 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 2 vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with hyper-threading enabled, providing 2 threads. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB per core, and includes 16 GB of local storage. This server is also Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks position this instance in the lower tiers. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and Geekbench is categorized as weak, falling in the bottom 25%, while multi-core performance drops to the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests show poor results, with uncached large-block reads at 13.15 GB/sec and writes at 10.79 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET performance, which reaches 1.55 million operations per second, also rank in the bottom 10%, indicating limited throughput for data-intensive tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2s_v3 offers a low-cost entry point for workloads that do not require high computational density or rapid memory throughput. Given the modest hardware profile and lower-tier benchmark results, this instance is best suited for light general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, development or testing environments, and small-scale applications with low resource demands.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8272CL x86_64 processor clocked at 2.6 GHz, delivering 2 vCPUs from a single physical core with hyper-threading. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of RAM and 16 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. Benchmark evaluations indicate modest performance, with single-core CPU metrics in the bottom 25% and multi-core, memory bandwidth, and database operations falling in the bottom 10%. Consequently, this server is qualitatively cost-effective for low-demand environments. It is best suited for basic web serving, light application hosting, and development or testing workloads that do not require high computational or memory throughput.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, designed for light workloads and development environments.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v3 is a general-purpose VM with 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, suitable for light development workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly, general-purpose virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon resources for light development and basic web serving workloads.
bullet_points: Features 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM on an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor
Includes 16 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Utilizes x86_64 architecture with hyper-threading enabled
Suited for low-demand workloads, basic web serving, and testing
Offers a cost-effective entry point for non-intensive applications
